spdx:Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial No Derivatives 2.5 Generic
Any license that does not meet the criteria above for allowed licenses
(including allowed for a specific category) is not-allowed.
Creative Commons Attribution Non-Commercial No Derivatives License 2.5
scancode:Creative Commons Attribution Non-Commercial No Derivatives License 2.5

LicenseTag (ScopedLicenseTag "OrtLicenseCategorization" "property:include-in-notice-file" (LicenseTagDescription "Whether the license includes a notice obligation or similar which can be fulfilled by adding the relevant copyright notices and the license text into the project/product notice file."))

LicenseTag (ScopedLicenseTag "OrtLicenseCategorization" "include-in-notice-file" (LicenseTagDescription "Same as above, as a temporary work-around for the category name not being configurable in ORT reports, see https://github.com/oss-review-toolkit/ort/issues/8220."))

LicenseTag (ScopedLicenseTag "OrtLicenseCategorization" "property:no-modifications" (LicenseTagDescription "Licenses with this property prohibit the making of modifications to the licensed content. This is initially applied to Creative Commons licenses but will be used more widely as license reviews progress. Contributions/pull requests are welcome."))

LicenseTag (ScopedLicenseTag "OrtLicenseCategorization" "free-restricted" (LicenseTagDescription "A permissive or open source-style license that contains restrictions regarding the usage of the work (for example, where a software is not allowed to be used in nuclear facilities) or the redistribution of the software (for example, where commercial redistribution of the software is not allowed without express permission). These licenses are not open source licenses, since they do not include all the required freedoms."))

LicenseTag (ScopedLicenseTag "OrtLicenseCategorization" "property:creativecommons" (LicenseTagDescription "Licenses and dedications published and maintained by the Creative Commons. These often apply to content that is not software, while sometimes also software is licensed under these licenses."))

LicenseTag (ScopedLicenseTag "OrtLicenseCategorization" "property:non-commercial" (LicenseTagDescription "Licenses that add a restriction that prevents the use of the software for commercial purposes."))
Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial No Derivatives 2.5
